BENE_RACE_CD 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary Race Code 
DESCRIPTION: The race of the beneficiary. 
SHORT NAME: RACE 
LONG NAME: BENE_RACE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 
VALUES: 
0 = Unknown 
1 = White 
2 = Black 
3 = Other 
4 = Asian 
5 = Hispanic 
6 = North American Native 
COMMENT: 
—
